task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Redmine as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Logged in as admin' or a 'Sign out' link in the top right corner of the Redmine web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the correct issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue page with the title 'Biometric authentication fails after app backgrounding on Android 14' in the 'Mobile Application v2' project.

task_completion.description: Verify the issue status was changed to 'In Progress'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Status' dropdown showing 'In Progress' in the edit form, or the issue details showing 'Status: In Progress' after saving.

task_completion.description: Verify the required note was added to the issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Starting investigation. Will test on Android 14 emulator and real device.' in the 'Notes' text area or in the issue's history/comments section.

task_completion.description: Verify the updates were successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., 'Successful update') and the issue page displaying the new 'In Progress' status and the added note in the history section.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window displaying the Redmine interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Redmine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Redmine UI elements and a valid URL in the browser address bar, not a local text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify no other fields were changed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the issue history/update log to ensure only the status was changed and a note was added; fields like Priority, Assignee, or Target version should remain unchanged.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target issue title contains 'Biometric authentication fails after app backgrounding'. The expected new status is 'In Progress'. The expected note to be added starts with 'Starting investigation'.
